title: FLOSS Weekly 340: VeraCrypt
summary:
Randal and Aaron are joined by Mounir Idrassi to talk about VeraCrypt. VeraCrypt is a free disk encryption software brought to you by IDRIX and is based on TrueCrypt 7.1a.
Download or subscribe to this show at https://twit.tv/shows/floss-weekly
Thanks to CacheFly for providing the bandwidth for this podcast and Lullabot's Jeff Robbins, web designer and musician, for our theme music.
